validation_results.code_quality: High. The implementation uses a clean, pattern-based exclusion mechanism that is easy to extend and thoroughly verified by unit tests.
edge_cases_covered: Absolute vs relative paths for artifacts
Mixed lists of user files and artifacts

criteria_verification.notes: Verified that player_turn_N.json files are excluded via the .guardkit/autobuild/ pattern in _DOC_LEVEL_EXCLUDED_PATTERNS.
Verified that all paths starting with .guardkit/autobuild/ are excluded by the _is_doc_level_excluded filter.
Verified that _validate_file_count_constraint filters the file list before counting and uses that count in the warning message.
Verified 29 unit tests in tests/unit/test_agent_invoker_doc_constraint.py pass, covering all exclusion logic.
Verified that 2 user files + artifacts do not trigger a warning at the minimal level (limit 2).

rationale: The implementation correctly excludes internal artifacts from the documentation constraint count, ensuring that only user-created files trigger the warning. This is verified by both code inspection and a comprehensive suite of 29 passing unit tests.
